title: HeartMesh
description: A 3D mesh extracted from CT scan data, ready for GPU rendering. Generated by tools/ct-processor/process_ct.py and consumed by the WebGPU renderer in the dicom-model app.

vertices.description: Interleaved vertex data in groups of 6 floats: [x, y, z, nx, ny, nz, ...]. The x/y/z values are the vertex positions in the model space; nx/ny/nz are surface normals used for lighting. Total vertex count = vertices.length / 6.

indices.description: Triangle indices into the vertices array. Every 3 consecutive indices form one triangle. Indices may exceed 65535, so consumers must use Uint32Array (not Uint16Array) when uploading to GPU index buffers. Total triangle count = indices.length / 3.
